scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix innovate-hub-core && npm install --prefix ideahub-backend && npm install --prefix innovate-hub-core/snapcart/frontend && npm install --prefix innovate-hub-core/snapcart/socket
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix innovate-hub-core" "npm run dev --prefix ideahub-backend"
scripts.render-build: npm install && npm install --prefix innovate-hub-core && npm install --prefix ideahub-backend && npm run build --prefix innovate-hub-core && mkdir -p ideahub-backend/public && cp -r innovate-hub-core/dist/* ideahub-backend/public/
